visual_base.visual_narrative_log: (1) Indoor supermarket setting, specifically within a Costco warehouse. Two women are looking into a glass-topped freezer unit. The woman on the right wears a dark blue off-shoulder ruffled top, a dark beret, and holds her hand to her chest with an expressive face. The woman on the left wears a white puffy-sleeved top and leans in to see the products. The background shows retail shelves and industrial lighting. (2) Close-up shot of a transparent plastic container holding four large sub sandwiches. Each sandwich is visible through the plastic, containing multiple whole bright red strawberries nestled in a bed of shredded brown pork floss and white cream. Price tags and nutritional labels are stuck to the top. (3) Returning to the medium shot at the freezer, the women gesture excitedly. The woman in the beret points towards a nearly empty shelf inside the freezer, while the other woman adjusts her hair. Their facial expressions are animated, showing surprise and intrigue. (4) Narrative shift to an indoor home living room. The same two women are seated at a wooden table. The woman in the beret holds a single sandwich, which has been partially sliced, up to the lens to reveal a cross-section of red jam and cream. A leather couch and plush toys are visible in the background. (5) Close-up shot on the wooden table where a knife is used to cut through the soft bread of the sandwich. The focus is on the layers of strawberries, pork floss, and filling. Hand gestures are used to highlight the size of the fruit. (6) The women are shown tasting the sandwich. They react with wide smiles, nodding, and thumbs-up gestures toward the camera, indicating high satisfaction. The lighting is bright and warm.
visual_base.text_narrative_log: (1) [Logo]: COSTCO WHOLESALE. [Slogan]: 我是勇者. [Subtitle]: 我是勇者 我來挑戰了. (2) [Variety]: 邪教系列. [Slogan]: 草莓肉鬆潛艇堡. [Subtitle]: 新鮮草莓肉鬆潛艇堡. (3) [Variety]: 你敢吃嗎. [Subtitle]: 你敢吃嗎 399元4入. (4) [Slogan]: 399元4入. [Variety]: 一個快100塊. [Subtitle]: 一個快100塊. (5) [Subtitle]: 喔 我這個心跳很快 因為要嘛好吃. (6) [Variety]: 不好吃. [Subtitle]: 要嘛你就是... 不然勒. (7) [Variety]: 挑戰看看. [Subtitle]: 好 我們來挑戰看看 告訴大家值不值得買. (8) [Subtitle]: 因為它其實賣掉蠻多的 你看 剩蠻少的. (9) [Subtitle]: 還是銷量本身不好. (10) [Variety]: 草莓蠻大的. [Subtitle]: 這草莓蠻大的 選一個. (11) [Slogan]: 有肉鬆 又有草莓 包在潛艇堡裡面. [Subtitle]: 有肉鬆 又有草莓 包在潛艇堡裡面. (12) [Variety]: 值不值得 回去開箱給你們看. [Subtitle]: 值不值得 回去開箱給你們看. (13) [Subtitle]: 這一條要100塊. (14) [Variety]: 三顆大草莓. [Subtitle]: 你敢信上面有 三顆大草莓 還有肉鬆. (15) [Slogan]: 馬斯卡邦乳酪以及草莓醬. [Subtitle]: 馬斯卡邦乳酪以及草莓醬. (16) [Variety]: 超級. [Subtitle]: 我竟然覺得 超級好吃. (17) [Subtitle]: 建議大家可以囤貨 因為它很好吃. (18) [Slogan]: 趕快加入這個邪教. [Subtitle]: 趕快加入這個邪教. (19) [Variety]: 打開世界的大門. [Subtitle]: 你會打開世界的大門. (20) [Subtitle]: 它的比例做得很好 如果你當天拿的是. (21) [Subtitle]: 好師傅做的麵包 既乾爽又蓬鬆. (22) [Subtitle]: 草莓非常的大顆. (23) [Variety]: 酸甜有味. [Subtitle]: 酸甜有味 不會到很甜. (24) [Subtitle]: 那肉鬆呢 就是一個點綴 鹹鹹的配上這個. (25) [Subtitle]: 馬斯卡邦乳酪 歐伊系~ 草莓醬也剛剛好. (26) [Subtitle]: 不會...不搶走風采 卻更加美味. (27) [Subtitle]: 有點像什麼 有一些奶蓋上面撒了一點點. (28) [Subtitle]: 海鹽那種感覺 它每一個比例都拿得非常的剛好. (29) [Subtitle]: 草莓醬不會太多 拿馬斯卡邦配那個肉鬆 喔. (30) [Variety]: 絕搭. [Subtitle]: 絕搭 真的是超搭. (31) [Subtitle]: 很好吃喔 你一定要試試看. (32) [Subtitle]: 趕快分享給想嚐鮮 但不敢買的朋友. (33) [Variety]: 一定要試看看. [Subtitle]: 一定要試看看.

visual_human_presence.countingEvidence: Two main female creators are visible throughout the shopping and tasting sequences.
visual_human_presence.mainCharacterDescription: One woman wears a dark beret and a navy blue off-shoulder top. The second woman has long dark hair and wears a white puff-sleeved top and later a purple top.

visual_scene_and_style.backgroundDescribe: First half is inside a brightly lit Costco warehouse with metal racks and freezers. Second half is inside a cozy living room with a brown couch and plush characters (like Gudetama).

audio_base.audio_narrative_log: (1) Fast-paced acoustic guitar-led background music begins immediately. A female voice speaks with high energy and a rising pitch contour. (2) A 'pop' sound effect triggers as variety-style text appears. Vocal loudness increases while reacting to the price of the food. (3) A sharp 'ding' sound effect marks a transition to a close-up. The music maintains a steady 4/4 rhythm with light percussion. (4) Interaction between two female voices occurs; the second voice is slightly lower in volume but shares the same excited tone. Sounds of plastic rustling are heard during the transition to the opening of the box. (5) A 'whoosh' sound effect accompanies a jump cut. The sound of a knife cutting through a crusty bread roll is audible over the music. (6) High-pitched vocal exclamations of delight ('Mm!', 'Oh!') are layered over the continuous acoustic music as the tasting commences. Acoustic atmosphere remains consistent with an indoor setting.

narrative_and_purpose.narrativeStructure: Montage: Hook -> Location Introduction -> Product Display -> Contextual Explanation -> Tasting Review -> Final Recommendation.
narrative_and_purpose.mainPurpose: To conduct a tasting review of a unique 'cult-favorite' food product (Strawberry and Pork Floss sub) found at Costco, aiming to entertain and inform followers through a trendy, high-energy format.

endorsement_analysis.endorsementCues: The video is presented as a personal challenge and independent review rather than a paid advertisement.

high_inference.freeDescribe: A classic short-form food vlog utilizing fast cuts and dynamic sound design to maintain high viewer engagement.
